name: Cats best Original 10L
shortDescription: Cat's best is a clumping encapsulting cat litter that stops odours, naturally and actively. As a clumping cat litter, Cat?s Best Original uses the natural power of active wood fibres, which effectively absorb liquids and odours – up to seven times their own volume, and trap them deep inside.
description: Cat?s Best Original uses the power of technologically refined active wood fibres as a clumping litter. These are manufactured using the new ICS Wood Fibre Technology** process. Liquids and odours are absorbed particularly effectively and encapsulated deep inside ? up to 7 times their own weight. Therefore Cat?s Best Original can remain in the litter box for up to 5 weeks before a complete change is necessary.
